creator: drue@therub.org
text:
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/handbook/geom-glabel.html

	Two lines reference /dev/ufs2, when in fact it should be /dev/ufs.

	"A label should now exist in /dev/ufs2 which may be added to /etc/fstab:"
	"/dev/ufs2/home     /home            ufs     rw              2      2"
